revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十一]][[zh:八月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 11|qq=August 11}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|qid=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō (Japan)|1=Chōshō}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1132|en|1132|qid=Q19582|lt=1132|1=1132}} {{ill|September 21|en|September 21|qid=Q2891|lt=September 21|1=September 21}} ) – Due to an epidemic, the era name changes from {{ill|Tenshō (Heian period)|en|Tenshō (Heian period)|qid=Q550527|lt=Tenshō|1=Tenshō (Heian period)}} to Chōshō. * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|qid=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō|1=Ryakuō}} 1 / {{ill|Engen (Japan)|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194159}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1338|en|1338|qid=Q6044|lt=1338|1=1338}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q297107}} is appointed {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} by the Northern Court. * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|qid=Q7671|lt=1688|1=1688}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ) – {{ill|Matsuo Bashō|en|Matsuo Bashō|qid=Q5676|lt=Matsuo Bashō|1=Matsuo Bashō}} departs on his journey recorded in {{ill|Sarashina Kikō|ja|更科紀行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarashina Kikō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1707|en|1707|qid=Q6841|lt=1707|1=1707}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} ) – Under the {{ill|Edicts on Compassion for Living Things|ja|生類憐れみの令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edicts on Compassion for Living Things|1=Shōrui Awaremi no Rei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10855187}} , businesses dealing in {{ill|Pond loach|en|Pond loach|qid=Q697487|lt=loaches|1=Pond loach}} , {{ill|Unagi|en|Unagi|qid=Q1422437|lt=eels|1=Unagi}} , and birds are banned. == Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun (era)|1=Kanbun (era)}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1667|en|1667|qid=Q7588|lt=1667|1=1667}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|qid=Q2883|lt=September 28|1=September 28}} ) – {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|qid=Q2866316|lt=Asano Naganori|1=Asano Naganori}} , lord of {{ill|Akō Domain|en|Akō Domain|qid=Q1062196|lt=Akao Domain|1=Akō Domain}} (+ {{ill|1701|en|1701|qid=Q6814|lt=1701|1=1701}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Kijūrō Shidehara|en|Kijūrō Shidehara|qid=Q335191|lt=Shidehara Kijūrō|1=Kijūrō Shidehara}} , 44th {{ill|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|ja|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|1=Prime Minister of Japan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q274948}} and 40th {{ill|House of Representatives (Japan)|en|House of Representatives (Japan)|qid=Q659587|lt=Speaker of the House of Representatives (Japan)|1=House of Representatives (Japan)}} (+ {{ill|1951|en|1951|qid=Q18591|lt=1951|1=1951}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōgen|en|Kōgen|qid=Q1194242|lt=Kōgen (Japan)|1=Kōgen}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|en|1256|qid=Q5502|lt=1256|1=1256}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} ) – {{ill|Kujō Yoritsune|en|Kujō Yoritsune|qid=Q471780|lt=Fujiwara no Yoritsune|1=Kujō Yoritsune}} , 4th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (* {{ill|1218|en|1218|qid=Q5381|lt=1218|1=1218}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1584|en|1584|qid=Q6728|lt=1584|1=1584}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}} ) – {{ill|Tsutsui Junkei|en|Tsutsui Junkei|qid=Q8192220|lt=Tsutsui Junkei|1=Tsutsui Junkei}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} (* {{ill|1549|en|1549|qid=Q6554|lt=1549|1=1549}} ). * {{ill|Tianqi (Ming dynasty)|ja|天啓 (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianqi (Ming dynasty)|1=Tianqi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q857085}} 6 / {{ill|Tianming (Later Jin)|ja|天命 (後金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianming (Later Jin)|1=Tianming era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q857010}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1626|en|1626|qid=Q6831|lt=1626|1=1626}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|qid=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}} ) – {{ill|Nurhaci|en|Nurhaci|qid=Q311189|lt=Nurhaci|1=Nurhaci}} , first emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|qid=Q8733|lt=Qing dynasty|1=Qing dynasty}} (* {{ill|1559|en|1559|qid=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} ) – {{ill|Kagami Iwa Hamanosuke|ja|鏡岩濱之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagami Iwa Hamanosuke|qq=}} , {{ill|Rikishi|en|Rikishi|qid=Q2727289|lt=sumo wrestler|1=Rikishi}} (* {{ill|1769|en|1769|qid=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}} ). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|10|8|12|7|11|9|8|0811|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
